'''fathozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cedilla|cedilla]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-th-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cedilla|cedilla]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fathozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæthezeth|fæthezeth]] || [[word:fæthezej|fæthezej]] || [[word:fæthezesh|fæthezesh]] || [[word:fætheze|fætheze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fathothozoth|fathothozoth]] || [[word:fathothozoj|fathothozoj]] || [[word:fathothozosh|fathothozosh]] || [[word:fathothozo|fathothozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fathozoth|fathozoth]] || [[word:fathozoj|fathozoj]] || [[word:fathozosh|fathozosh]] || [[word:fathozo|fathozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fathofzoth|fathofzoth]] || [[word:fathofzoj|fathofzoj]] || [[word:fathofzosh|fathofzosh]] || [[word:fathofzof|fathofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fathozotho|fathozotho]] || [[word:fathozojo|fathozojo]] || [[word:fathozosho|fathozosho]] || [[word:fathozoko|fathozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fathozoth|fathozoth]] || [[word:fathozoj|fathozoj]] || [[word:fathozosh|fathozosh]] || [[word:fathozo|fathozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fathozothol|fathozothol]] || [[word:fathozojol|fathozojol]] || [[word:fathozoshol|fathozoshol]] || [[word:fathozokol|fathozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fathozothotho|fathozothotho]] || [[word:fathozojojo|fathozojojo]] || [[word:fathozoshosho|fathozoshosho]] || [[word:fathozoko|fathozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fathozothon|fathozothon]] || [[word:fathozojon|fathozojon]] || [[word:fathozoshon|fathozoshon]] || [[word:fathozokon|fathozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fathozothoro|fathozothoro]] || [[word:fathozojoro|fathozojoro]] || [[word:fathozoshoro|fathozoshoro]] || [[word:fathozokoro|fathozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
